sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87979" key="promartu/romai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προμαρτύρομαι</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ῡ]</foreign>, <sense id="n87979.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bear witness to beforehand,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰ εἰς Χριστὸν παθήματα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg021.perseus-grc1:1:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">1 Ep.Pet.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
